what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment in the design-assets channel, mapping an attachment id to a target image URI and an addition timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
target uses a custom URI scheme 'image://design-assets/icons/image (12)'
file body is empty; no code or prose content
standouts: target URI contains a space and parentheses: 'image (12)'
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for ledger-style metadata
References asset via a custom image:// URI scheme
concerns: target URI contains unescaped spaces and parentheses, which may be fragile for parsers or URL handling
target name 'image (12)' looks like a placeholder or auto-generated name with no descriptive filename
no title, caption, or MIME type fields
notes: A minimal ledger entry registering an image attachment in the design-assets channel with a custom target URI and timestamp.
questions: What does '(12)' signify in the target URI?
Is 'image://' resolvable by the consuming system?
Which message or record references this attachment id?
What is the actual filename or MIME type of the image?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches content: it is an attachment metadata record and it records attachment metadata.
intention_signals: To create a persistent, timestamped association between an attachment identifier and a specific image asset location in the design-assets channel.
novelty: The target URI embeds a space and parentheses in the asset name ('image (12)'), which is unusual for machine-readable references.
contribution: Provides a concrete attachment-to-image mapping and a creation timestamp for an image in the design-assets channel, which a fused system would keep as a canonical attachment record.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-a1a37603 for the design-assets channel linking attachment type images to target image://design-assets/icons/image (12) with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To register and timestamp an image attachment in the design-assets channel.
